steps.title: Use the definition
steps.content: The phrase after the dash defines the features as impromptu deviations by performers when they do not have to follow an established score. The blank needs an adjective for something spontaneous or improvised.

steps.title: Reject wrong meanings
steps.content: Choice A means extremely careful, not spontaneous. Choice B means hard to notice, but visibility is not the issue. Choice C means certain to happen, while impromptu deviations are not predictable. The word meaning done without preparation fits the definition in the sentence. The answer is D.
